heading: Actions covered
label: 7542 Actions covered
text: This subchapter applies to a removal from the civil service or suspension for more than 14 days, but does not apply to an action initiated under , to a suspension or removal under , or to a removal under section 3592 or 3595 of this title.section 1215 of this titlesection 7532 of this title
